quotes.quote: If you let go a little, you will have a little peace. If you let go a lot, you will have a lot of peace.
quotes.author: Ajahn Chah

quotes.quote: Peace cannot be kept by force. It can only be achieved by understanding.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.quote: Better than a thousand hollow words, is one word that brings peace.
quotes.author: Buddha

quotes.quote: Do not overrate what you have received, nor envy others. He who envies others does not obtain peace of mind.
quotes.author: Buddha

quotes.quote: Those who are free of resentful thoughts surely find peace.
quotes.author: Buddha

quotes.quote: Character cannot be developed in ease and quiet. Only through experience of trial and suffering can the soul be strengthened, vision cleared, ambition inspired, and success achieved.
quotes.author: Helen Keller

quotes.quote: No act of kindness, no matter how small, is ever wasted.
quotes.author: Aesop

quotes.quote: In the depth of winter, I finally learned that there was within me an invincible summer.
quotes.author: Albert Camus

quotes.quote: Once we accept our limits, we go beyond them.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.quote: Constant kindness can accomplish much. As the sun makes ice melt, kindness causes misunderstanding, mistrust, and hostility to evaporate.
quotes.author: Albert Schweitzer

quotes.quote: No person is your friend who demands your silence, or denies your right to grow.
quotes.author: Alice Walker

quotes.quote: It is the mark of an educated mind to be able to entertain a thought without accepting it.
quotes.author: Aristotle

quotes.quote: In separateness lies the world's great misery, in compassion lies the world's true strength.
quotes.author: Buddha

quotes.quote: Silence is a true friend who never betrays.
quotes.author: Confucius

quotes.quote: The more you know yourself, the more you forgive yourself.
quotes.author: Confucius

quotes.quote: Keep silence for the most part, and speak only when you must, and then briefly.
quotes.author: Epictetus

quotes.quote: Make the best use of what is in your power, and take the rest as it happens.
quotes.author: Epictetus

quotes.quote: Kindness is the golden chain by which society is bound together.
quotes.author: Johann Wolfgang von Goethe

quotes.quote: But the fruit of the Spirit is love, joy, peace, longsuffering, gentleness, goodness, faith,
quotes.author: Paul

quotes.quote: And let the peace of God rule in your hearts, to the which also ye are called in one body; and be ye thankful.
quotes.author: Paul

quotes.quote: Thou wilt keep [him] in perfect peace, [whose] mind [is] stayed [on thee]: because he trusteth in thee.
quotes.author: Isaiah

quotes.quote: For I know the thoughts that I think toward you, saith the LORD, thoughts of peace, and not of evil, to give you an expected end.
quotes.author: Jeremiah

quotes.quote: Peace I leave with you, my peace I give unto you: not as the world giveth, give I unto you. Let not your heart be troubled, neither let it be afraid.
quotes.author: John

quotes.quote: And the peace of God, which passeth all understanding, shall keep your hearts and minds through Christ Jesus.
quotes.author: Paul

quotes.quote: Now the God of hope fill you with all joy and peace in believing, that ye may abound in hope, through the power of the Holy Ghost.
quotes.author: Paul

quotes.quote: And he said unto me, My grace is sufficient for thee: for my strength is made perfect in weakness. Most gladly therefore will I rather glory in my infirmities, that the power of Christ may rest upon me.
quotes.author: Paul

quotes.quote: And I will restore to you the years that the locust hath eaten, the cankerworm, and the caterpiller, and the palmerworm, my great army which I sent among you.
quotes.author: Joel

quotes.quote: Come unto me, all [ye] that labour and are heavy laden, and I will give you rest.
quotes.author: Matthew

quotes.quote: Cause me to hear thy lovingkindness in the morning; for in thee do I trust: cause me to know the way wherein I should walk; for I lift up my soul unto thee.
quotes.author: David

quotes.quote: And be not conformed to this world: but be ye transformed by the renewing of your mind, that ye may prove what [is] that good, and acceptable, and perfect, will of God.
quotes.author: Paul

quotes.quote: Now there are diversities of gifts, but the same Spirit.
quotes.author: Paul

quotes.quote: But the manifestation of the Spirit is given to every man to profit withal.
quotes.author: Paul

quotes.quote: Therefore, my beloved brethren, be ye stedfast, unmoveable, always abounding in the work of the Lord, forasmuch as ye know that your labour is not in vain in the Lord.
quotes.author: Paul

quotes.quote: But as it is written, Eye hath not seen, nor ear heard, neither have entered into the heart of man, the things which God hath prepared for them that love him.
quotes.author: Paul

quotes.quote: The personal life deeply lived always expands into truths beyond itself.
quotes.author: Anais Nin

quotes.quote: When you meet someone better than yourself, turn your thoughts to becoming his equal. When you meet someone not as good as you are, look within and examine your own self.
quotes.author: Confucius

quotes.quote: All that we are is the result of what we have thought. The mind is everything. What we think we become.
quotes.author: Buddha

quotes.quote: We are shaped by our thoughts; we become what we think. When the mind is pure, joy follows like a shadow that never leaves.
quotes.author: Buddha

quotes.quote: If you seek truth you will not seek victory by dishonourable means, and if you find truth you will become invincible.
quotes.author: Epictetus

quotes.quote: To understand the heart and mind of a person, look not at what he has already achieved, but at what he aspires to do.
quotes.author: Kahlil Gibran

quotes.quote: Very little is needed to make a happy life; it is all within yourself, in your way of thinking.
quotes.author: Marcus Aurelius

quotes.quote: Truth is generally the best vindication against slander.
quotes.author: Abraham Lincoln

quotes.quote: What is necessary to change a person is to change his awareness of himself.
quotes.author: Abraham Maslow

quotes.quote: Anyone who doesn't take truth seriously in small matters cannot be trusted in large ones either.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.quote: Imagination is more important than knowledge. For while knowledge defines all we currently know and understand, imagination points to all we might yet discover and create.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.quote: Parents can only give good advice or put them on the right paths, but the final forming of a persons character lies in their own hands.
quotes.author: Anne Frank

quotes.quote: Never apologize for showing feeling. When you do so, you apologize for truth.
quotes.author: Benjamin Disraeli

quotes.quote: We know the truth, not only by the reason, but by the heart.
quotes.author: Blaise Pascal

quotes.quote: If you propose to speak, always ask yourself, is it true, is it necessary, is it kind.
quotes.author: Buddha

quotes.quote: In a controversy the instant we feel anger we have already ceased striving for the truth, and have begun striving for ourselves.
quotes.author: Buddha

quotes.quote: The thought manifests as the word. The word manifests as the deed. The deed develops into habit. And the habit hardens into character.
quotes.author: Buddha

quotes.quote: There are only two mistakes one can make along the road to truth; not going all the way, and not starting.
quotes.author: Buddha

quotes.quote: Three things cannot be long hidden: the sun, the moon, and the truth.
quotes.author: Buddha

quotes.quote: You, yourself, as much as anybody in the entire universe, deserve your love and affection.
quotes.author: Buddha

quotes.quote: And ye shall know the truth, and the truth shall make you free.
quotes.author: John

quotes.quote: According as his divine power hath given unto us all things that [pertain] unto life and godliness, through the knowledge of him that hath called us to glory and virtue:
quotes.author: Peter

quotes.quote: For God hath not given us the spirit of fear; but of power, and of love, and of a sound mind.
quotes.author: Paul

quotes.quote: And be renewed in the spirit of your mind;
quotes.author: Paul

quotes.quote: If any of you lack wisdom, let him ask of God, that giveth to all [men] liberally, and upbraideth not; and it shall be given him.
quotes.author: James

quotes.quote: Draw nigh to God, and he will draw nigh to you. Cleanse [your] hands, [ye] sinners; and purify [your] hearts, [ye] double minded.
quotes.author: James

quotes.quote: Brethren, I count not myself to have apprehended: but [this] one thing [I do], forgetting those things which are behind, and reaching forth unto those things which are before,
quotes.author: Paul

quotes.quote: The liberal soul shall be made fat: and he that watereth shall be watered also himself.
quotes.author: Solomon

quotes.quote: Commit thy works unto the LORD, and thy thoughts shall be established.
quotes.author: Solomon

quotes.quote: Trust in the LORD with all thine heart; and lean not unto thine own understanding.
quotes.author: Solomon

quotes.quote: In all thy ways acknowledge him, and he shall direct thy paths.
quotes.author: Solomon

quotes.quote: Create in me a clean heart, O God; and renew a right spirit within me.
quotes.author: David

quotes.quote: There is no fear in love; but perfect love casteth out fear: because fear hath torment. He that feareth is not made perfect in love.
quotes.author: John

quotes.quote: As every man hath received the gift, [even so] minister the same one to another, as good stewards of the manifold grace of God.
quotes.author: Peter

quotes.quote: Casting all your care upon him; for he careth for you.
quotes.author: Peter

quotes.quote: Wherefore comfort yourselves together, and edify one another, even as also ye do.
quotes.author: Paul

quotes.quote: When I dare to be powerful, to use my strength in the service of my vision, then it becomes less and less important whether I am afraid.
quotes.author: Audre Lorde

quotes.quote: Silence is a source of great strength.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.quote: Courage is what it takes to stand up and speak; courage is also what it takes to sit down and listen.
quotes.author: Winston Churchill

quotes.quote: Be sure you put your feet in the right place, then stand firm.
quotes.author: Abraham Lincoln

quotes.quote: One who gains strength by overcoming obstacles possesses the only strength which can overcome adversity.
quotes.author: Albert Schweitzer

quotes.quote: Life shrinks or expands in proportion to one's courage.
quotes.author: Anais Nin

quotes.quote: It is better to understand a little than to misunderstand a lot.
quotes.author: Anatole France

quotes.quote: Moral excellence comes about as a result of habit. We become just by doing just acts, temperate by doing temperate acts, brave by doing brave acts.
quotes.author: Aristotle

quotes.quote: Those that know, do. Those that understand, teach.
quotes.author: Aristotle

quotes.quote: Without courage, wisdom bears no fruit.
quotes.author: Baltasar Gracian

quotes.quote: I hear and I forget. I see and I remember. I do and I understand.
quotes.author: Confucius

quotes.quote: If you look into your own heart, and you find nothing wrong there, what is there to worry about? What is there to fear?
quotes.author: Confucius

quotes.quote: Fear grows in darkness; if you think there's a bogeyman around, turn on the light.
quotes.author: Dorothy Thompson

quotes.quote: Only when we are no longer afraid do we begin to live.
quotes.author: Dorothy Thompson

quotes.quote: People grow through experience if they meet life honestly and courageously. This is how character is built.
quotes.author: Eleanor Roosevelt

quotes.quote: We could never learn to be brave and patient if there were only joy in the world.
quotes.author: Helen Keller

quotes.quote: Correction does much, but encouragement does more.
quotes.author: Johann Wolfgang von Goethe

quotes.quote: He who controls others may be powerful, but he who has mastered himself is mightier still.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.quote: If you correct your mind, the rest of your life will fall into place.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.quote: The power of intuitive understanding will protect you from harm until the end of your days.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.quote: Strength does not come from physical capacity. It comes from an indomitable will.
quotes.author: Mahatma Gandhi

quotes.quote: The LORD [is] my light and my salvation; whom shall I fear? the LORD [is] the strength of my life; of whom shall I be afraid?
quotes.author: David

quotes.quote: Fear thou not; for I [am] with thee: be not dismayed; for I [am] thy God: I will strengthen thee; yea, I will help thee; yea, I will uphold thee with the right hand of my righteousness.
quotes.author: Isaiah

quotes.quote: Stand fast therefore in the liberty wherewith Christ hath made us free, and be not entangled again with the yoke of bondage.
quotes.author: Paul

quotes.quote: But they that wait upon the LORD shall renew [their] strength; they shall mount up with wings as eagles; they shall run, and not be weary; [and] they shall walk, and not faint.
quotes.author: Isaiah

quotes.quote: Enlarge the place of thy tent, and let them stretch forth the curtains of thine habitations: spare not, lengthen thy cords, and strengthen thy stakes;
quotes.author: Isaiah

quotes.quote: I can do all things through Christ which strengtheneth me.
quotes.author: Paul

quotes.quote: [There are] many devices in a man's heart; nevertheless the counsel of the LORD, that shall stand.
quotes.author: Solomon

quotes.quote: I will praise thee; for I am fearfully [and] wonderfully made: marvellous [are] thy works; and [that] my soul knoweth right well.
quotes.author: David

quotes.quote: I sought the LORD, and he heard me, and delivered me from all my fears.
quotes.author: David

quotes.quote: Rejoice evermore.
quotes.author: Paul

quotes.quote: In every thing give thanks: for this is the will of God in Christ Jesus concerning you.
quotes.author: Paul

quotes.quote: Now the Lord is that Spirit: and where the Spirit of the Lord [is], there [is] liberty.
quotes.author: Paul

quotes.quote: For which cause we faint not; but though our outward man perish, yet the inward [man] is renewed day by day.
quotes.author: Paul

quotes.quote: (For we walk by faith, not by sight:)
quotes.author: Paul

quotes.quote: Being enriched in every thing to all bountifulness, which causeth through us thanksgiving to God.
quotes.author: Paul

quotes.quote: And God [is] able to make all grace abound toward you; that ye, always having all sufficiency in all [things], may abound to every good work:
quotes.author: Paul

quotes.quote: I believe that a simple and unassuming manner of life is best for everyone, best both for the body and the mind.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.quote: There is not one big cosmic meaning for all, there is only the meaning we each give to our life.
quotes.author: Anais Nin

quotes.quote: You learn to speak by speaking, to study by studying, to run by running, to work by working; in just the same way, you learn to love by loving.
quotes.author: Anatole France

quotes.quote: Imagination disposes of everything; it creates beauty, justice, and happiness, which are everything in this world.
quotes.author: Blaise Pascal

quotes.quote: In the sky, there is no distinction of east and west; people create distinctions out of their own minds and then believe them to be true.
quotes.author: Buddha

quotes.quote: To give ones self earnestly to the duties due to men, and, while respecting spiritual beings, to keep aloof from them, may be called wisdom.
quotes.author: Confucius

quotes.quote: The universe is transformation; our life is what our thoughts make it.
quotes.author: Marcus Aurelius

quotes.quote: The exercise of an extraordinary gift is the supremest pleasure in life.
quotes.author: Mark Twain

quotes.quote: When you learn, teach. When you get, give.
quotes.author: Maya Angelou

quotes.quote: The mind unlearns with difficulty what it has long learned.
quotes.author: Seneca

quotes.quote: Always bear in mind that your own resolution to succeed is more important than any one thing.
quotes.author: Abraham Lincoln

quotes.quote: For we are his workmanship, created in Christ Jesus unto good works, which God hath before ordained that we should walk in them.
quotes.author: Paul

quotes.quote: Having then gifts differing according to the grace that is given to us, whether prophecy, [let us prophesy] according to the proportion of faith;
quotes.author: Paul

quotes.quote: And we know that all things work together for good to them that love God, to them who are the called according to [his] purpose.
quotes.author: Paul

quotes.quote: To every [thing there is] a season, and a time to every purpose under the heaven:
quotes.author: Solomon

quotes.quote: Now unto him that is able to do exceeding abundantly above all that we ask or think, according to the power that worketh in us,
quotes.author: Paul

quotes.quote: And that ye put on the new man, which after God is created in righteousness and true holiness.
quotes.author: Paul

quotes.quote: Every good gift and every perfect gift is from above, and cometh down from the Father of lights, with whom is no variableness, neither shadow of turning.
quotes.author: James

quotes.quote: Give, and it shall be given unto you; good measure, pressed down, and shaken together, and running over, shall men give into your bosom. For with the same measure that ye mete withal it shall be measured to you again.
quotes.author: Luke

quotes.quote: For unto every one that hath shall be given, and he shall have abundance: but from him that hath not shall be taken away even that which he hath.
quotes.author: Matthew

quotes.quote: Ye are the light of the world. A city that is set on an hill cannot be hid.
quotes.author: Matthew

quotes.quote: Ask, and it shall be given you; seek, and ye shall find; knock, and it shall be opened unto you:
quotes.author: Matthew

quotes.quote: Being confident of this very thing, that he which hath begun a good work in you will perform [it] until the day of Jesus Christ:
quotes.author: Paul

quotes.quote: For it is God which worketh in you both to will and to do of [his] good pleasure.
quotes.author: Paul

quotes.quote: A man's gift maketh room for him, and bringeth him before great men.
quotes.author: Solomon

quotes.quote: Keep thy heart with all diligence; for out of it [are] the issues of life.
quotes.author: Solomon

quotes.quote: For his anger [endureth but] a moment; in his favour [is] life: weeping may endure for a night, but joy [cometh] in the morning.
quotes.author: David

quotes.quote: To accomplish great things, we must not only act, but also dream; not only plan, but also believe.
quotes.author: Anatole France

quotes.quote: Do not dwell in the past, do not dream of the future, concentrate the mind on the present moment.
quotes.author: Buddha

quotes.quote: The future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams.
quotes.author: Eleanor Roosevelt

quotes.quote: Character is like a tree and reputation like a shadow. The shadow is what we think of it; the tree is the real thing.
quotes.author: Abraham Lincoln

quotes.quote: Try not to become a man of success, but rather try to become a man of value.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.quote: Dreams pass into the reality of action. From the actions stems the dream again; and this interdependence produces the highest form of living.
quotes.author: Anais Nin

quotes.quote: The dream was always running ahead of me. To catch up, to live for a moment in unison with it, that was the miracle.
quotes.author: Anais Nin

quotes.quote: To accomplish great things, we must dream as well as act.
quotes.author: Anatole France

quotes.quote: Work out your own salvation. Do not depend on others.
quotes.author: Buddha

quotes.quote: I am not bothered by the fact that I am unknown. I am bothered when I do not know others.
quotes.author: Confucius

quotes.quote: Most of the important things in the world have been accomplished by people who have kept on trying when there seemed to be no hope at all.
quotes.author: Dale Carnegie

quotes.quote: Not every difficult and dangerous thing is suitable for training, but only that which is conducive to success in achieving the object of our effort.
quotes.author: Epictetus

quotes.quote: Keep yourself to the sunshine and you cannot see the shadow.
quotes.author: Helen Keller

quotes.quote: If one advances confidently in the direction of his dream, and endeavours to live the life which he had imagines, he will meet with a success unexpected in common hours.
quotes.author: Henry David Thoreau

quotes.quote: If you must tell me your opinions, tell me what you believe in. I have plenty of doubts of my own.
quotes.author: Johann Wolfgang von Goethe

quotes.quote: A leader is best when people barely know he exists, when his work is done, his aim fulfilled, they will say: we did it ourselves.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.quote: By letting it go it all gets done. The world is won by those who let it go. But when you try and try. The world is beyond the winning.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.quote: Jesus said unto him, If thou canst believe, all things [are] possible to him that believeth.
quotes.author: Mark

quotes.quote: And whatsoever ye do, do [it] heartily, as to the Lord, and not unto men;
quotes.author: Paul

quotes.quote: And let us not be weary in well doing: for in due season we shall reap, if we faint not.
quotes.author: Paul

quotes.quote: Now faith is the substance of things hoped for, the evidence of things not seen.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.quote: Wherefore seeing we also are compassed about with so great a cloud of witnesses, let us lay aside every weight, and the sin which doth so easily beset [us], and let us run with patience the race that is set before us,
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.quote: Behold, I will do a new thing; now it shall spring forth; shall ye not know it? I will even make a way in the wilderness, [and] rivers in the desert.
quotes.author: Isaiah

quotes.quote: But be ye doers of the word, and not hearers only, deceiving your own selves.
quotes.author: James

quotes.quote: Blessed [is] the man that trusteth in the LORD, and whose hope the LORD is.
quotes.author: Jeremiah

quotes.quote: And Jesus said unto them, Because of your unbelief: for verily I say unto you, If ye have faith as a grain of mustard seed, ye shall say unto this mountain, Remove hence to yonder place; and it shall remove; and nothing shall be impossible unto you.
quotes.author: Matthew

quotes.quote: But Jesus beheld [them], and said unto them, With men this is impossible; but with God all things are possible.
quotes.author: Matthew

quotes.quote: But seek ye first the kingdom of God, and his righteousness; and all these things shall be added unto you.
quotes.author: Matthew

quotes.quote: He hath shewed thee, O man, what [is] good; and what doth the LORD require of thee, but to do justly, and to love mercy, and to walk humbly with thy God?
quotes.author: Micah

quotes.quote: Thy word [is] a lamp unto my feet, and a light unto my path.
quotes.author: David

quotes.quote: The steps of a [good] man are ordered by the LORD: and he delighteth in his way.
quotes.author: David

quotes.quote: And let the beauty of the LORD our God be upon us: and establish thou the work of our hands upon us; yea, the work of our hands establish thou it.
quotes.author: David

quotes.quote: And not only [so], but we glory in tribulations also: knowing that tribulation worketh patience;
quotes.author: Paul

quotes.quote: The only real valuable thing is intuition.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.quote: There are only two ways to live your life. One is as though nothing is a miracle. The other is as though everything is a miracle.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.quote: We cannot solve our problems with the same thinking we used when we created them.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.quote: Never say there is nothing beautiful in the world any more. There is always something to make you wonder in the shape of a tree, the trembling of a leaf.
quotes.author: Albert Schweitzer

quotes.quote: The possession of knowledge does not kill the sense of wonder and mystery. There is always more mystery.
quotes.author: Anais Nin

quotes.quote: How wonderful it is that nobody need wait a single moment before starting to improve the world.
quotes.author: Anne Frank

quotes.quote: The heart has its reasons, which reason does not know.
quotes.author: Blaise Pascal

quotes.quote: Experience keeps a dear school, but fools will learn in no other.
quotes.author: Benjamin Franklin

quotes.quote: We must learn our limits. We are all something, but none of us are everything.
quotes.author: Blaise Pascal

quotes.quote: He who experiences the unity of life sees his own Self in all beings, and all beings in his own Self, and looks on everything with an impartial eye.
quotes.author: Buddha

quotes.quote: Meditation brings wisdom; lack of mediation leaves ignorance. Know well what leads you forward and what hold you back, and choose the path that leads to wisdom.
quotes.author: Buddha

quotes.quote: Remembering a wrong is like carrying a burden on the mind.
quotes.author: Buddha

quotes.quote: Finally, my brethren, be strong in the Lord, and in the power of his might.
quotes.author: Paul

quotes.quote: Let us hold fast the profession of [our] faith without wavering; (for he [is] faithful that promised;)
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.quote: And thine ears shall hear a word behind thee, saying, This [is] the way, walk ye in it, when ye turn to the right hand, and when ye turn to the left.
quotes.author: Isaiah

quotes.quote: Remember ye not the former things, neither consider the things of old.
quotes.author: Isaiah

quotes.quote: And the LORD shall guide thee continually, and satisfy thy soul in drought, and make fat thy bones: and thou shalt be like a watered garden, and like a spring of water, whose waters fail not.
quotes.author: Isaiah

quotes.quote: Call unto me, and I will answer thee, and shew thee great and mighty things, which thou knowest not.
quotes.author: Jeremiah

quotes.quote: If the Son therefore shall make you free, ye shall be free indeed.
quotes.author: John

quotes.quote: For where your treasure is, there will your heart be also.
quotes.author: Luke

quotes.quote: But my God shall supply all your need according to his riches in glory by Christ Jesus.
quotes.author: Paul

quotes.quote: Be careful for nothing; but in every thing by prayer and supplication with thanksgiving let your requests be made known unto God.
quotes.author: Paul

quotes.quote: Finally, brethren, whatsoever things are true, whatsoever things [are] honest, whatsoever things [are] just, whatsoever things [are] pure, whatsoever things [are] lovely, whatsoever things [are] of good report; if [there be] any virtue, and if [there be] any praise, think on these things.
quotes.author: Paul

quotes.quote: A man's heart deviseth his way: but the LORD directeth his steps.
quotes.author: Solomon

quotes.quote: This [is] the day [which] the LORD hath made; we will rejoice and be glad in it.
quotes.author: David

quotes.quote: My help [cometh] from the LORD, which made heaven and earth.
quotes.author: David

quotes.quote: The LORD [is] my shepherd; I shall not want.
quotes.author: David

quotes.quote: I will instruct thee and teach thee in the way which thou shalt go: I will guide thee with mine eye.
quotes.author: David

quotes.quote: Character develops itself in the stream of life.
quotes.author: Johann Wolfgang von Goethe

quotes.quote: God has given you one face, and you make yourself another.
quotes.author: William Shakespeare

quotes.quote: What you do not want done to yourself, do not do to others.
quotes.author: Confucius

quotes.quote: Friendship with oneself is all important because without it one cannot be friends with anybody else in the world.
quotes.author: Eleanor Roosevelt

quotes.quote: It is not fair to ask of others what you are unwilling to do yourself.
quotes.author: Eleanor Roosevelt

quotes.quote: First say to yourself what you would be; and then do what you have to do.
quotes.author: Epictetus

quotes.quote: Know, first, who you are, and then adorn yourself accordingly.
quotes.author: Epictetus

quotes.quote: Practice yourself, for heavens sake in little things, and then proceed to greater.
quotes.author: Epictetus

quotes.quote: When you are offended at any man's fault, turn to yourself and study your own failings. Then you will forget your anger.
quotes.author: Epictetus

quotes.quote: When you are content to be simply yourself and don't compare or compete, everybody will respect you.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.quote: He who lives in harmony with himself lives in harmony with the world.
quotes.author: Marcus Aurelius

quotes.quote: Be yourself; everyone else is already taken.
quotes.author: Oscar Wilde

quotes.quote: The aim of life is self-development. To realize ones nature perfectly that is what each of us is here for.
quotes.author: Oscar Wilde

quotes.quote: Happiness is a perfume you cannot pour on others without getting a few drops on yourself.
quotes.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quotes.quote: Be miserable. Or motivate yourself. Whatever has to be done, it's always your choice.
quotes.author: Wayne Dyer

quotes.quote: When you judge another, you do not define them, you define yourself.
quotes.author: Wayne Dyer

quotes.quote: Before you can inspire with emotion, you must be swamped with it yourself. Before you can move their tears, your own must flow. To convince them, you must yourself believe.
quotes.author: Winston Churchill

quotes.quote: You have to do your own growing no matter how tall your grandfather was.
quotes.author: Abraham Lincoln

quotes.quote: The LORD [is] nigh unto them that are of a broken heart; and saveth such as be of a contrite spirit.
quotes.author: David

quotes.quote: Commit thy way unto the LORD; trust also in him; and he shall bring [it] to pass.
quotes.author: David

quotes.quote: Be still, and know that I [am] God: I will be exalted among the heathen, I will be exalted in the earth.
quotes.author: David

quotes.quote: Not slothful in business; fervent in spirit; serving the Lord;
quotes.author: Paul

quotes.quote: And patience, experience; and experience, hope:
quotes.author: Paul

quotes.quote: Nay, in all these things we are more than conquerors through him that loved us.
quotes.author: Paul

quotes.quote: When I let go of what I am, I become what I might be.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.quote: A person who never made a mistake never tried anything new.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.quote: An optimist is a person who sees a green light everywhere, while the pessimist sees only the red spotlight... The truly wise person is colour-blind.
quotes.author: Albert Schweitzer

quotes.quote: There is only one corner of the universe you can be certain of improving, and that's your own self.
quotes.author: Aldous Huxley

quotes.quote: No one has ever become poor by giving.
quotes.author: Anne Frank

quotes.quote: Difficulties are things that show a person what they are.
quotes.author: Epictetus

quotes.quote: No man is free who is not master of himself.
quotes.author: Epictetus

quotes.quote: I prefer to be true to myself, even at the hazard of incurring the ridicule of others, rather than to be false, and to incur my own abhorrence.
quotes.author: Frederick Douglass

quotes.quote: Sometimes our fate resembles a fruit tree in winter. Who would think that those branches would turn green again and blossom, but we hope it, we know it.
quotes.author: Johann Wolfgang von Goethe

quotes.quote: The person born with a talent they are meant to use will find their greatest happiness in using it.
quotes.author: Johann Wolfgang von Goethe

quotes.quote: Treat people as if they were what they ought to be and you help them to become what they are capable of being.
quotes.author: Johann Wolfgang von Goethe

quotes.quote: He who conquers others is strong; He who conquers himself is mighty.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.quote: He who knows others is wise. He who knows himself is enlightened.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.quote: I have just three things to teach: simplicity, patience, compassion. These three are your greatest treasures.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.quote: Kindness in words creates confidence. Kindness in thinking creates profoundness. Kindness in giving creates love.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.quote: We must become the change we want to see.
quotes.author: Mahatma Gandhi

quotes.quote: Everything we hear is an opinion, not a fact. Everything we see is a perspective, not the truth.
quotes.author: Marcus Aurelius

quotes.quote: He who lives in harmony with himself lives in harmony with the universe.
quotes.author: Marcus Aurelius

quotes.quote: There is nothing happens to any person but what was in his power to go through with.
quotes.author: Marcus Aurelius

quotes.quote: Always tell the truth. That way, you don't have to remember what you said.
quotes.author: Mark Twain

quotes.quote: To change ones life, start immediately, do it flamboyantly, no exceptions.
quotes.author: William James

quotes.quote: What do we live for, if it is not to make life less difficult for each other?
quotes.author: George Eliot

quotes.quote: The wise man does not lay up his own treasures. The more he gives to others, the more he has for his own.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.quote: It is the quality of our work which will please God, not the quantity.
quotes.author: Mahatma Gandhi

quotes.quote: Most of the shadows of life are caused by standing in our own sunshine.
quotes.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quotes.quote: Begin at once to live and count each separate day as a separate life.
quotes.author: Seneca

quotes.quote: Many of life's failures are people who did not realize how close they were to success when they gave up.
quotes.author: Thomas Edison

quotes.quote: Doing what you love is the cornerstone of having abundance in your life.
quotes.author: Wayne Dyer

quotes.quote: Act as if what you do makes a difference. It does.
quotes.author: William James

quotes.quote: As our case is new, we must think and act anew.
quotes.author: Abraham Lincoln

quotes.quote: Do something wonderful, people may imitate it.
quotes.author: Albert Schweitzer

quotes.quote: Experience is not what happens to a man. It is what a man does with what happens to him.
quotes.author: Aldous Huxley

quotes.quote: Age does not protect you from love. But love, to some extent, protects you from age.
quotes.author: Anais Nin

quotes.quote: Action may not always bring happiness; but there is no happiness without action.
quotes.author: Benjamin Disraeli

quotes.quote: The greatest good you can do for another is not just share your riches, but reveal to them their own.
quotes.author: Benjamin Disraeli

quotes.quote: The greatest good you can do for another is not just to share your riches but to reveal to him his own.
quotes.author: Benjamin Disraeli

quotes.quote: Well done is better than well said.
quotes.author: Benjamin Franklin

quotes.quote: The conditions of conquest are always easy. We have but to toil awhile, endure awhile, believe always, and never turn back.
quotes.author: Seneca

quotes.quote: No valid plans for the future can be made by those who have no capacity for living now.
quotes.author: Alan Watts

quotes.quote: In the middle of every difficulty lies opportunity.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.quote: If you light a lamp for somebody, it will also brighten your path.
quotes.author: Buddha

quotes.quote: Thousands of candles can be lighted from a single candle, and the life of the candle will not be shortened. Happiness never decreases by being shared.
quotes.author: Buddha

quotes.quote: It is impossible for a man to learn what he thinks he already knows.
quotes.author: Epictetus

quotes.quote: Face your deficiencies and acknowledge them; but do not let them master you. Let them teach you patience, sweetness, insight.
quotes.author: Helen Keller

quotes.quote: Beauty is not in the face; beauty is a light in the heart.
quotes.author: Kahlil Gibran

quotes.quote: Look back over the past, with its changing empires that rose and fell, and you can foresee the future, too.
quotes.author: Marcus Aurelius

quotes.quote: Loss is nothing else but change,and change is Natures delight.
quotes.author: Marcus Aurelius

quotes.quote: I believe that every person is born with talent.
quotes.author: Maya Angelou

quotes.quote: Prejudice is a burden that confuses the past, threatens the future and renders the present inaccessible.
quotes.author: Maya Angelou

quotes.quote: Cherish your visions and your dreams as they are the children of your soul, the blueprints of your ultimate achievements.
quotes.author: Napoleon Hill

quotes.quote: Every adversity, every failure, every heartache carries with it the seed of an equal or greater benefit.
quotes.author: Napoleon Hill

quotes.quote: Luck is what happens when preparation meets opportunity.
quotes.author: Seneca

quotes.quote: I walk slowly, but I never walk backward.
quotes.author: Abraham Lincoln

quotes.quote: Autumn is a second spring when every leaf is a flower.
quotes.author: Albert Camus

quotes.quote: Feeling and longing are the motive forces behind all human endeavor and human creations.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.quote: Logic will get you from A to B. Imagination will take you everywhere.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.quote: We should all be thankful for those people who rekindle the inner spirit.
quotes.author: Albert Schweitzer

quotes.quote: Wherever a man turns he can find someone who needs him.
quotes.author: Albert Schweitzer

quotes.quote: In all things of nature there is something of the marvellous.
quotes.author: Aristotle

quotes.quote: If one way be better than another, that you may be sure is natures way.
quotes.author: Aristotle

quotes.quote: We make our own fortunes and we call them fate.
quotes.author: Benjamin Disraeli

quotes.quote: The heart has its reasons which reason knows not of.
quotes.author: Blaise Pascal

quotes.quote: Kind words do not cost much. Yet they accomplish much.
quotes.author: Blaise Pascal

quotes.quote: Man is equally incapable of seeing the nothingness from which he emerges and the infinity in which he is engulfed.
quotes.author: Blaise Pascal

quotes.quote: The least movement is of importance to all nature. The entire ocean is affected by a pebble.
quotes.author: Blaise Pascal

quotes.quote: We are all something, but none of us are everything.
quotes.author: Blaise Pascal

quotes.quote: Your worst enemy cannot harm you as much as your own unguarded thoughts.
quotes.author: Buddha

quotes.quote: The way is not in the sky. The way is in the heart.
quotes.author: Buddha

quotes.quote: No one saves us but ourselves. No one can and no one may. We ourselves must walk the path.
quotes.author: Buddha

quotes.quote: Chaos is inherent in all compounded things. Strive on with diligence.
quotes.author: Buddha

quotes.quote: What you are is what you have been. What you will be is what you do now.
quotes.author: Buddha

quotes.quote: Wherever you go, go with all your heart.
quotes.author: Confucius

quotes.quote: Reviewing what you have learned and learning anew, you are fit to be a teacher.
quotes.author: Confucius

quotes.quote: It does not matter how slowly you go as long as you do not stop.
quotes.author: Confucius

quotes.quote: To study and not think is a waste. To think and not study is dangerous.
quotes.author: Confucius

quotes.quote: The superior man is modest in his speech, but exceeds in his actions.
quotes.author: Confucius

quotes.quote: The Superior Man is aware of Righteousness, the inferior man is aware of advantage.
quotes.author: Confucius

quotes.quote: Fine words and an insinuating appearance are seldom associated with true virtue
quotes.author: Confucius

quotes.quote: The superior man acts before he speaks, and afterwards speaks according to his action.
quotes.author: Confucius

quotes.quote: Learning without reflection is a waste, reflection without learning is dangerous.
quotes.author: Confucius

quotes.quote: Sincerity is the way of Heaven. The attainment of sincerity is the way of men.
quotes.author: Confucius

quotes.quote: All that we are is the result of what we have thought: it is founded on our thoughts, it is made up of our thoughts.
quotes.author: Dhammapada

quotes.quote: If a man speaks or acts with a pure thought, happiness follows him, like a shadow that never leaves him.
quotes.author: Dhammapada

quotes.quote: Hatred does not cease by hatred at any time: hatred ceases by love, this is an old rule.
quotes.author: Dhammapada

quotes.quote: Earnestness is the path of immortality, thoughtlessness the path of death.
quotes.author: Dhammapada

quotes.quote: Self is the lord of self; who else could be the lord?
quotes.author: Dhammapada

quotes.quote: The highest excellence is like water.
quotes.author: Laozi

quotes.quote: The partial becomes complete; the crooked, straight; the empty, full; the worn out, new.
quotes.author: Laozi

quotes.quote: He who knows other men is discerning; he who knows himself is intelligent.
quotes.author: Laozi

quotes.quote: The Tao in its regular course does nothing, and so there is nothing which it does not do.
quotes.author: Laozi

quotes.quote: The tree which fills the arms grew from the tiniest sprout; the tower of nine storeys rose from a small heap of earth.
quotes.author: Laozi

quotes.quote: Your right is only to work, but not to its results; do not let the results of action be your motive, nor let your attachment be to inaction.
quotes.author: Bhagavad Gita

quotes.quote: Be steadfast in performing your duties, abandoning all attachment to success and failure - such equanimity is called Yoga.
quotes.author: Bhagavad Gita

quotes.quote: Yoga is skill in action.
quotes.author: Bhagavad Gita

quotes.quote: Let a man raise himself by himself; let him not lower himself.
quotes.author: Bhagavad Gita

quotes.quote: Abandon all varieties of dharma and simply surrender unto Me alone.
quotes.author: Bhagavad Gita

quotes.quote: For indeed, with hardship [will be] ease.
quotes.author: Qur'an

quotes.quote: Indeed, with hardship [will be] ease.
quotes.author: Qur'an

quotes.quote: Indeed, Allah will not change the condition of a people until they change what is in themselves.
quotes.author: Qur'an

quotes.quote: Rise, awake! having obtained your boons, understand them!
quotes.author: Katha Upanishad

quotes.quote: When the five instruments of knowledge stand still together with the mind, and when the intellect does not move, that is called the highest state.
quotes.author: Katha Upanishad

quotes.quote: Even a fool may be wise after the event.
quotes.author: Homer

quotes.quote: Of all creatures that breathe and move upon the earth, there is none that is weaker than man.
quotes.author: Homer

quotes.quote: Bear up, my heart; you have had worse than this to bear.
quotes.author: Homer

quotes.quote: Fortune sides with him who dares.
quotes.author: Virgil

quotes.quote: Endure, and keep yourselves for days of happiness.
quotes.author: Virgil

quotes.quote: In His will is our peace.
quotes.author: Dante Alighieri

quotes.quote: The mind is its own place, and in itself can make a Heaven of Hell, a Hell of Heaven.
quotes.author: John Milton

quotes.quote: Go to your bosom: Knock there, and ask your heart what it doth know.
quotes.author: William Shakespeare
quotes.source: Measure for Measure, Act II, Scene II

quotes.quote: This above all: to thine own self be true.
quotes.author: William Shakespeare

quotes.quote: There is nothing either good or bad, but thinking makes it so.
quotes.author: William Shakespeare

quotes.quote: The readiness is all.
quotes.author: William Shakespeare

quotes.quote: Our remedies oft in ourselves do lie.
quotes.author: William Shakespeare
quotes.source: All's Well That Ends Well, Act I, Scene I

quotes.quote: Sweet are the uses of adversity.
quotes.author: William Shakespeare
quotes.source: As You Like It, Act II, Scene I

quotes.quote: The fault, dear Brutus, is not in our stars, but in ourselves.
quotes.author: William Shakespeare
quotes.source: Julius Caesar, Act I, Scene II

quotes.quote: Courage is resistance to fear, mastery of fear - not absence of fear.
quotes.author: Mark Twain

quotes.quote: We should be careful to get out of an experience only the wisdom that is in it - and stop there.
quotes.author: Mark Twain

quotes.quote: Everyone is a moon, and has a dark side which he never shows to anybody.
quotes.author: Mark Twain

quotes.quote: When angry, count four; when very angry, swear.
quotes.author: Mark Twain

quotes.quote: The universe is change; our life is what our thoughts make it.
quotes.author: Marcus Aurelius

quotes.quote: If it is not right, do not do it: if it is not true, do not say it.
quotes.author: Marcus Aurelius

quotes.quote: Confine thyself to the present.
quotes.author: Marcus Aurelius

quotes.quote: Of things some are in our power, and others are not.
quotes.author: Epictetus

quotes.quote: Difficulties strengthen the mind, as labor does the body.
quotes.author: Seneca

quotes.quote: The beginning is the most important part of the work.
quotes.author: Plato

quotes.quote: While there's life, there's hope.
quotes.author: Cicero

quotes.quote: It is right to learn, even from the enemy.
quotes.author: Ovid

quotes.quote: I am no bird; and no net ensnares me: I am a free human being with an independent will.
quotes.author: Charlotte Bronte

quotes.quote: No one is useless in this world who lightens the burdens of another.
quotes.author: Charles Dickens

quotes.quote: Trust thyself: every heart vibrates to that iron string.
quotes.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quotes.quote: Nothing can bring you peace but yourself.
quotes.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quotes.quote: Go confidently in the direction of your dreams. Live the life you have imagined.
quotes.author: Henry David Thoreau

quotes.quote: Simplify, simplify.
quotes.author: Henry David Thoreau
quotes.source: Walden, Where I Lived, and What I Lived For

quotes.quote: If there is no struggle, there is no progress.
quotes.author: Frederick Douglass

quotes.quote: The scientific man does not aim at an immediate result. His duty is to lay the foundation for those who are to come, and point the way.
quotes.author: Nikola Tesla

quotes.quote: My method is different. I do not rush into actual work.
quotes.author: Nikola Tesla

quotes.quote: When I get an idea I start at once building it up in my imagination.
quotes.author: Nikola Tesla

quotes.quote: Be alone, that is the secret of invention; be alone, that is when ideas are born.
quotes.author: Nikola Tesla

quotes.quote: Genius is one percent inspiration and ninety-nine percent perspiration.
quotes.author: Thomas Edison

quotes.quote: Opportunity is missed by most people because it is dressed in overalls and looks like work.
quotes.author: Thomas Edison

quotes.quote: I find out what the world needs. Then, I go ahead and invent it.
quotes.author: Thomas Edison

quotes.quote: The Analytical Engine weaves algebraic patterns, just as the Jacquard loom weaves flowers and leaves.
quotes.author: Ada Lovelace

quotes.quote: Imagination is the discovering faculty, pre-eminently.
quotes.author: Ada Lovelace

quotes.quote: I am never so happy as when I am really engaged in good earnest.
quotes.author: Ada Lovelace

quotes.quote: It is easier to ask forgiveness than it is to get permission.
quotes.author: Grace Hopper

quotes.quote: If it's a good idea, go ahead and do it.
quotes.author: Grace Hopper

quotes.quote: The most dangerous phrase in the language is: We've always done it this way.
quotes.author: Grace Hopper

quotes.quote: Where there is no vision, there is no hope.
quotes.author: George Washington Carver

quotes.quote: You never change things by fighting the existing reality. To change something, build a new model that makes the existing model obsolete.
quotes.author: Buckminster Fuller

quotes.quote: I just invent, then wait until man comes around to needing what I've invented.
quotes.author: Buckminster Fuller

quotes.quote: When I am working on a problem, I never think about beauty. But when I have finished, if the solution is not beautiful, I know it is wrong.
quotes.author: Buckminster Fuller

quotes.quote: Simplicity is the ultimate sophistication.
quotes.author: Leonardo da Vinci

quotes.quote: Learning never exhausts the mind.
quotes.author: Leonardo da Vinci

quotes.quote: Art is never finished, only abandoned.
quotes.author: Leonardo da Vinci

quotes.quote: Knowing is not enough; we must apply. Being willing is not enough; we must do.
quotes.author: Leonardo da Vinci

quotes.quote: If we all worked on the assumption that what is accepted as true is really true, there would be little hope of advance.
quotes.author: Orville Wright

quotes.quote: The desire to fly is an idea handed down to us by our ancestors.
quotes.author: Wilbur Wright

quotes.quote: It is possible to fly without motors, but not without knowledge and skill.
quotes.author: Wilbur Wright

quotes.quote: We are all apprentices in a craft where no one ever becomes a master.
quotes.author: Ernest Hemingway

quotes.quote: The best way to predict the future is to invent it.
quotes.author: Alan Kay

quotes.quote: Simple things should be simple, complex things should be possible.
quotes.author: Alan Kay

quotes.quote: The original idea of the web was that it should be a collaborative space where you can communicate through sharing information.
quotes.author: Tim Berners-Lee

quotes.quote: Data is a precious thing and will last longer than the systems themselves.
quotes.author: Tim Berners-Lee

quotes.quote: Stay hungry. Stay foolish.
quotes.author: Steve Jobs

quotes.quote: You've got to find what you love.
quotes.author: Steve Jobs

quotes.quote: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
quotes.author: Steve Jobs

quotes.quote: I believe that unarmed truth and unconditional love will have the final word in reality.
quotes.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

quotes.quote: Right temporarily defeated is stronger than evil triumphant.
quotes.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

quotes.quote: There is still hope for a brighter tomorrow.
quotes.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

quotes.quote: Love begins at home, and it is not how much we do, but how much love we put in the action that we do.
quotes.author: Mother Teresa

quotes.quote: Let us always meet each other with a smile, for the smile is the beginning of love.
quotes.author: Mother Teresa

quotes.quote: What surprised me most was that in her suffering, in her hunger, she knew that somebody else was hungry.
quotes.author: Mother Teresa

quotes.quote: Do your little bit of good where you are; it's those little bits of good put together that overwhelm the world.
quotes.author: Desmond Tutu

quotes.quote: A person is a person because he recognizes others as persons.
quotes.author: Desmond Tutu

quotes.quote: We are made for goodness. We are made for love.
quotes.author: Desmond Tutu

quotes.quote: Tenderness is the path of choice for the strongest, most courageous men and women.
quotes.author: Pope Francis

quotes.quote: Tenderness is not weakness; it is fortitude.
quotes.author: Pope Francis

quotes.quote: The future is in the hands of those people who recognize the other as a you and themselves as part of an us.
quotes.author: Pope Francis

quotes.quote: Mindfulness allows you to live deeply every moment that is given you to live.
quotes.author: Thich Nhat Hanh

quotes.quote: By the way we live our daily life we contribute to peace or to war.
quotes.author: Thich Nhat Hanh

quotes.quote: Every step can be nourishing and every step can be healing.
quotes.author: Thich Nhat Hanh
quotes.source: Plum Village: The Art of Mindful Living

quotes.quote: True compassion is not just an emotional response but a firm commitment founded on reason.
quotes.author: Dalai Lama
quotes.source: The Office of His Holiness the Dalai Lama, Compassion

quotes.quote: The key to a happier and more successful world is the growth of compassion.
quotes.author: Dalai Lama
quotes.source: The Office of His Holiness the Dalai Lama, Compassion

quotes.quote: I learned that courage was not the absence of fear, but the triumph over it.
quotes.author: Nelson Mandela

quotes.quote: It always seems impossible until it's done.
quotes.author: Nelson Mandela

quotes.quote: Education is the most powerful weapon which you can use to change the world.
quotes.author: Nelson Mandela

quotes.quote: The wound is the place where the Light enters you.
quotes.author: Rumi

quotes.quote: All shall be well, and all shall be well, and all manner of thing shall be well.
quotes.author: Julian of Norwich

quotes.quote: The fullness of joy is to behold God in everything.
quotes.author: Julian of Norwich

quotes.quote: For we are so preciously loved by God that we cannot even comprehend it.
quotes.author: Julian of Norwich

quotes.quote: You do not need to know precisely what is happening, or exactly where it is all going.
quotes.author: Thomas Merton

quotes.quote: The gate of heaven is everywhere.
quotes.author: Thomas Merton

quotes.quote: Our job is to love others without stopping to inquire whether or not they are worthy.
quotes.author: Thomas Merton

quotes.quote: The real enemies of our life are the oughts and the ifs.
quotes.author: Henri Nouwen

quotes.quote: Compassion asks us to go where it hurts.
quotes.author: Henri Nouwen

quotes.quote: Nothing ever goes away until it has taught us what we need to know.
quotes.author: Pema Chodron

quotes.quote: Only to the extent that we expose ourselves over and over to annihilation can that which is indestructible be found in us.
quotes.author: Pema Chodron

quotes.quote: Fear is a natural reaction to moving closer to the truth.
quotes.author: Pema Chodron

quotes.quote: The practice of love offers no place of safety. We risk loss, hurt, pain.
quotes.author: bell hooks

quotes.quote: Love is an action, never simply a feeling.
quotes.author: bell hooks

quotes.quote: There is no greater agony than bearing an untold story inside you.
quotes.author: Maya Angelou
quotes.source: I Know Why the Caged Bird Sings

quotes.quote: Do the best you can until you know better. Then when you know better, do better.
quotes.author: Maya Angelou

quotes.quote: It is the little things citizens do. That's what will make the difference.
quotes.author: Wangari Maathai

quotes.quote: The generation that destroys the environment is not the generation that pays the price.
quotes.author: Wangari Maathai

quotes.quote: One child, one teacher, one book, and one pen can change the world.
quotes.author: Malala Yousafzai

quotes.quote: Let us make our future now, and let us make our dreams tomorrow's reality.
quotes.author: Malala Yousafzai

quotes.quote: The extremists were, and they are, afraid of books and pens.
quotes.author: Malala Yousafzai

quotes.quote: Hope arouses, as nothing else can arouse, a passion for the possible.
quotes.author: William Sloane Coffin

quotes.quote: The world is too dangerous for anything but truth and too small for anything but love.
quotes.author: William Sloane Coffin

quotes.quote: Aspire not to have more, but to be more.
quotes.author: Oscar Romero

quotes.quote: There are many things that can only be seen through eyes that have cried.
quotes.author: Oscar Romero

quotes.quote: We plant the seeds that one day will grow.
quotes.author: Bishop Ken Untener
quotes.source: Prophets of a Future Not Our Own

quotes.quote: What you hold in mind tends to manifest.
quotes.author: David R. Hawkins
quotes.source: Letting Go: The Pathway of Surrender

quotes.quote: We are only subject to what we hold in mind.
quotes.author: David R. Hawkins
quotes.source: Letting Go: The Pathway of Surrender, Ch. 15

quotes.quote: The body tends to manifest what the mind believes.
quotes.author: David R. Hawkins
quotes.source: Letting Go: The Pathway of Surrender, Ch. 15

quotes.quote: The only power that anything has over us is the power of belief that we give it.
quotes.author: David R. Hawkins
quotes.source: Letting Go: The Pathway of Surrender, Ch. 15

quotes.quote: Choose you this day whom ye will serve.
quotes.author: Joshua

quotes.quote: The truth shall make you free.
quotes.author: John

quotes.quote: Be not afraid, only believe.
quotes.author: Mark

quotes.quote: If any of you lack wisdom, let him ask of God.
quotes.author: James

quotes.quote: Perfect love casteth out fear.
quotes.author: John

quotes.quote: With God all things are possible.
quotes.author: Matthew

quotes.quote: Not all of us can do great things. But we can do small things with great love.
quotes.author: Mother Teresa
quotes.source: Quoted in Time: Queen Elizabeth Christmas Day Address

quotes.quote: As I change my thoughts, the world around me changes.
quotes.author: Louise Hay

quotes.quote: When we are no longer able to change a situation, we are challenged to change ourselves.
quotes.author: Viktor Frankl

quotes.quote: Knowing your own darkness is the best method for dealing with the darknesses of other people.
quotes.author: Carl Jung

quotes.quote: Care about people's approval and you will be their prisoner.
quotes.author: Laozi
quotes.source: Tao Te Ching, Chapter 9 (Stephen Mitchell rendering)

quotes.quote: People are disturbed not by things, but by the views they take of them.
quotes.author: Epictetus

quotes.quote: The God who gave us life gave us liberty at the same time.
quotes.author: Thomas Jefferson
quotes.source: A Summary View of the Rights of British America

quotes.quote: Liberty, when it begins to take root, is a plant of rapid growth.
quotes.author: George Washington

quotes.quote: Be still, and know that I am God.
quotes.author: David

quotes.quote: This is the day which the LORD hath made; we will rejoice and be glad in it.
quotes.author: David

quotes.quote: Keep thy heart with all diligence; for out of it are the issues of life.
quotes.author: Solomon

quotes.quote: Behold, I will do a new thing; now it shall spring forth.
quotes.author: Isaiah

quotes.quote: Blessed are the pure in heart: for they shall see God.
quotes.author: Matthew

quotes.quote: I am come that they might have life, and that they might have it more abundantly.
quotes.author: John

quotes.quote: Stand fast therefore in the liberty wherewith Christ hath made us free.
quotes.author: Paul

quotes.quote: Whatsoever things are true, whatsoever things are honest, whatsoever things are just, whatsoever things are pure, think on these things.
quotes.author: Paul

quotes.quote: Knowing this, that the trying of your faith worketh patience.
quotes.author: James

quotes.quote: So, surely with hardship comes ease.
quotes.author: Qur'an

quotes.quote: You have a right to perform your prescribed duties, but you are not entitled to the fruits of your actions.
quotes.author: Bhagavad Gita

quotes.quote: Elevate yourself through the power of your mind, and not degrade yourself.
quotes.author: Bhagavad Gita

quotes.quote: Let a man overcome anger by love, let him overcome evil by good.
quotes.author: Dhammapada

quotes.quote: By oneself the evil is done, by oneself one suffers.
quotes.author: Dhammapada

quotes.quote: He who knows others is wise; he who knows himself is enlightened.
quotes.author: Laozi

quotes.quote: Deal with things before they happen; put things in order before there is confusion.
quotes.author: Laozi

quotes.quote: The good is one thing, the pleasant another.
quotes.author: Katha Upanishad
quotes.source: Sacred Books of the East, Volume 15, Katha-upanishad

quotes.quote: Waste no more time arguing about what a good man should be. Be one.
quotes.author: Marcus Aurelius

quotes.quote: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way.
quotes.author: Marcus Aurelius

quotes.quote: Do not seek to have events happen as you wish, but wish them to happen as they do happen.
quotes.author: Epictetus

quotes.quote: If you would improve, be content to be thought foolish and stupid.
quotes.author: Epictetus

quotes.quote: It is not the man who has too little, but the man who craves more, that is poor.
quotes.author: Seneca

quotes.quote: If a man knows not to which port he sails, no wind is favorable.
quotes.author: Seneca

quotes.quote: A man is literally what he thinks, his character being the complete sum of all his thoughts.
quotes.author: James Allen

quotes.quote: Man is made or unmade by himself.
quotes.author: James Allen

quotes.quote: A man's mind may be likened to a garden, which may be intelligently cultivated or allowed to run wild.
quotes.author: James Allen

quotes.quote: Nothing is at last sacred but the integrity of your own mind.
quotes.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quotes.quote: What I must do is all that concerns me, not what the people think.
quotes.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quotes.quote: Do your work, and I shall know you.
quotes.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quotes.quote: Power concedes nothing without a demand.
quotes.author: Frederick Douglass

quotes.quote: The limits of tyrants are prescribed by the endurance of those whom they oppress.
quotes.author: Frederick Douglass

quotes.quote: Success is to be measured not so much by the position that one has reached in life as by the obstacles which he has overcome.
quotes.author: Booker T. Washington

quotes.quote: The credit belongs to the man who is actually in the arena.
quotes.author: Theodore Roosevelt

quotes.quote: The idea came like a flash of lightning and in an instant the truth was revealed.
quotes.author: Nikola Tesla

quotes.quote: Peace can only come as a natural consequence of universal enlightenment.
quotes.author: Nikola Tesla
quotes.source: The Problem of Increasing Human Energy

quotes.quote: I have not failed. I've just found 10,000 ways that won't work.
quotes.author: Thomas Edison

quotes.quote: I never did anything by accident, nor did any of my inventions come by accident; they came by work.
quotes.author: Thomas Edison

quotes.quote: I refuse to accept despair as the final response to the ambiguities of history.
quotes.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

quotes.quote: Sooner or later all the people of the world will have to discover a way to live together in peace.
quotes.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

quotes.quote: Love begins at home.
quotes.author: Mother Teresa

quotes.quote: Love is a state of awareness, a way of being in the world, a way of seeing oneself and others.
quotes.author: David R. Hawkins

quotes.quote: Unconditional love has the greatest power of all.
quotes.author: David R. Hawkins

quotes.quote: He said not, Thou shalt not be tempested, thou shalt not be travailed, thou shalt not be distressed.
quotes.author: Julian of Norwich

quotes.quote: Vanity of vanities, and all is vanity, except to love God, and Him only to serve.
quotes.author: Thomas a Kempis
quotes.source: The Imitation of Christ, Book I

quotes.quote: We ought not to be weary of doing little things for the love of God.
quotes.author: Brother Lawrence
quotes.source: The Practice of the Presence of God

quotes.quote: The time for thinkers has come.
quotes.author: Mary Baker Eddy
quotes.source: Science and Health with Key to the Scriptures

quotes.quote: If one advances confidently in the direction of his dreams, he will meet with a success unexpected in common hours.
quotes.author: Henry David Thoreau

quotes.quote: I exist as I am, that is enough.
quotes.author: Walt Whitman

quotes.quote: Believe that life is worth living, and your belief will help create the fact.
quotes.author: William James

quotes.quote: For the sick it is important to have the best.
quotes.author: Florence Nightingale

quotes.quote: I have ploughed and planted, and gathered into barns, and no man could head me.
quotes.author: Sojourner Truth

quotes.quote: I never ran my train off the track and I never lost a passenger.
quotes.author: Harriet Tubman
quotes.source: Sarah H. Bradford, Scenes in the Life of Harriet Tubman

quotes.quote: The dogmas of the quiet past are inadequate to the stormy present.
quotes.author: Abraham Lincoln

quotes.quote: With malice toward none; with charity for all.
quotes.author: Abraham Lincoln

quotes.quote: Action is indeed the sole medium of expression for ethics.
quotes.author: Jane Addams
